channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: A judge in Texas rules 3 other states can challenge access to abortion pill mifepristone nationwide
item.description: A federal judge in Texas is allowing three other states to pursue a challenge seeking to restrict access to the abortion pill mifepristone nationwide.
item.dc:creator: Geoff Mulvihill, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Ellison joins 13 states to defend health care coverage for DACA recipients
item.description: The effort is in response to a legal challenge led by Kansas and several other states against a Biden administration rule.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Thamer, MPR News

item.title: Speaker Johnson appoints new Intelligence chairman after surprise shakeup
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — House Speaker Mike Johnson appointed Rep. Rick Crawford, R-Ark., as the new chairman of the House Intelligence Committee on Thursday after asserting that the panel needed a fresh start.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nazi flag-bearing man gets 8 years in prison for truck crashing near White House
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A Missouri man who crashed a rental truck into barriers protecting the White House was sentenced Thursday to eight years in prison for an attack that prosecutors said was inspired by his fascination with Nazi ideology, court records show.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: State senator pushed to the ground, arrested while trying to enter Georgia House chamber
item.description: A Georgia state senator and hardline supporter of President-elect Trump appeared to be pushed to the floor before being arrested while trying to enter the state House chamber on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Donald Trump vows to help ‘troubled’ Hollywood with Mel Gibson, Jon Voight and Sylvester Stallone
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Donald Trump wants to make Hollywood “bigger, better and stronger” and has cast Mel Gibson, Jon Voight and Sylvester Stallone as stars of what he is calling his “Special Ambassadors to a great but very troubled place, Hollywood, California.
item.dc:creator: LINDSEY BAHR and JILL COLVIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Turner tackles HUD program reforms at confirmation hearing for housing secretary
item.description: There were sports analogies galore but few policy specifics during Scott Turner ’s confirmation hearing on Thursday to become housing secretary.
item.dc:creator: SALLY HO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump picks a former air crewman and space expert to head the Air Force
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has named Troy Meink, a former Air Force KC-135 tanker navigator and former deputy of the National Reconnaissance Office, as his choice to serve as the top civilian leader for the Air Force.
item.dc:creator: Tara Copp, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: FBI closed DEI office in December, agency says
item.description: The FBI confirmed to Fox News Digital that the agency closed its office of Diversity, Equity and Inclusion in December.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ratcliffe edges closer to CIA confirmation with Democratic support: 5 takeaways
item.description: John Ratcliffe emerged largely unscathed from a hearing before the Senate Intelligence Committee that appeared to pave the way for him to serve as the next director of the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA).
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Rudy Giuliani’s Florida condo, World Series rings on the line in latest trial
item.description: Rudy Giuliani will again square off in court against two Georgia election workers Thursday, this time seeking to keep his Florida condominium and other prized possessions from the women who won a $146 million defamation judgment against him.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, NewsNation

item.title: Scott Stringer announces run for New York City mayor
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Former New York City Comptroller Scott Stringer is joining the 2025 race for New York City mayor, he announced on PIX11 News on Thursday. He has a long political career, previously serving as the Manhattan borough president and a New York State Assembly member.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11

item.title: A need for speed: Several states are looking for ways to count votes faster
item.description: Lawmakers in California and other states want to change vote-counting rules to speed up the process. One key question is whether counting can be sped up without sacrificing access to the ballot.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Lopez, MPR News

item.title: Five things to know about Biden's farewell address that also served as a warning to the country
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — With only days left in the White House, President Joe Biden was saving a few surprises for his farewell address Wednesday evening.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden warns of oligarchy forming in US during White House farewell speech
item.description: President Biden used his farewell address from the Oval Office on Wednesday to warn Americans of an oligarchy taking shape in the U.S. while issuing warnings of other threats to the nation as he prepares to depart the White House.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: TikTok ban to impact local businesses, content creators
item.description: San Diego is home to talented and creative content creators who make a living on TikTok. While many are able to make a full-time income on the app, some are also helping small businesses in return, who say the app has inadvertently helped them tremendously.
item.dc:creator: Zara Barker, Fox 5

item.title: Trump is exploring ways to 'preserve' TikTok as company's CEO gets inaugural invite, his team says
item.description: TikTok CEO Shou Zi Chew is expected to attend Donald Trump’s inauguration and be granted a prime seating location.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Michelle Obama signals she’s done with Trump
item.description: Michelle Obama is done with President-elect Donald Trump, if her decision to skip the inauguration means anything.
item.dc:creator: Amie Parnes, NewsNation

item.title: Few US adults confident Justice Department and FBI will act fairly under Trump, AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: As President-elect Donald Trump’s pick for attorney general, Pam Bondi, prepares for questioning from senators on Wednesday, only about 2 in 10 U.S.
item.dc:creator: AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump's Cabinet pick for attorney general is Pam Bondi. Here's what to know
item.description: Bondi is expected to receive broad support from Republicans but face sharp questions from Democrats who have concerns about whether she will protect the Justice Department from political influence.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Lucas, MPR News

item.title: Capitol chaos: DeSantis faces backlash from Florida lawmakers over special session
item.description: Desantis says the state needs new laws to help President Trump carry out his immigration reforms in Florida. But there's some disagreement over that special session.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: House barrels toward fight over placing conditions on California fire aid
item.description: The House is barreling toward a contentious debate over disaster relief for California as many — but not all — Republicans call for conditions to be placed on the assistance, an idea Democrats are soundly rejecting. Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, NewsNation

item.title: Nevada elections leader urges real-time efficiency over changing deadlines
item.description: The influx of mail-in ballots collected on Election Day led to delays in tabulation across Nevada, not the number of ballots received in the days after, Democratic Nevada Secretary of State Cisco Aguilar said ahead of the legislative session.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Hegseth beats back blows from Democrats in blistering hearing: 5 takeaways
item.description: Pete Hegseth, President-elect Trump's choice for Defense secretary, on Tuesday emerged largely unscathed from an at times blistering confirmation hearing before the Senate Armed Services Committee.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: These 2 Democrats voted for House Republicans' bill to bar transgender athletes from girls sports
item.description: Reps. Vicente Gonzalez and Henry Cuellar, both of Texas, were the only Democrats to side with Republicans on Tuesday to pass legislation meant to bar transgender athletes from competing in girls and women’s sports.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, NewsNation

item.title: Wisconsin’s governor creates new violence-prevention office in wake of school shooting
item.description: Wisconsin’s Democratic governor on Tuesday created a new office dedicated to preventing gun violence, a month after a school shooting not far from the state Capitol and an idea that drew immediate opposition from Republicans who said it was misguided.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: NY plan would make community college free: Who qualifies
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Gov. Kathy Hochul on Tuesday announced a plan to make community college free for adults pursuing in-demand careers.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, PIX 11

item.title: Biden to lift Cuba terrorism designation, reversing Trump decision in final week in office
item.description: The Biden administration announced on Tuesday that it will remove Cuba from the list of State Sponsors of Terrorism (SST) in exchange for the release of political prisoners jailed for protesting against the regime in July 2021.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, NewsNation

item.title: Blinken makes the case for post-war reconstruction, security and governance of Gaza
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Secretary of State Antony Blinken made a last-minute case Tuesday for a plan for the post-war reconstruction and governance of Gaza as a ceasefire between Israel and Hamas appears tantalizingly close to completion.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Gov. Kathy Hochul delivers State of the State address in NY
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – During her State of the State address, Gov. Kathy Hochul proposed free tuition for older college students, more police on New York City's subways overnight and tax relief for New Yorkers.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, PIX 11

item.title: Senate GOP incumbents brace for MAGA primary challengers
item.description: Several GOP Senate incumbents are already staring down the threat of primary challenges next year as friction builds between the MAGA and establishment wings. Sen.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: READ: Special counsel's final report in Trump Jan. 6 case
item.description: The Justice Department released special counsel Jack Smith's report on President-elect Donald Trump's election interference case, just days before he returns to the White House.
item.dc:creator: The Hill, Fox 5

item.title: Senate District 60 primary results: 9 candidates running in election to decide control of the Minnesota Senate
item.description: The recent death of Minneapolis state Sen. Kari Dziedzic left a 33-33 tie in the Minnesota Senate. A primary for her seat set for Tuesday features seven DFLers and two Republicans. The primary winners from each party will face each other in a Jan. 28 election.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Alvarez, MPR News

item.title: Biden takes unexpected, impromptu questions from press in final days
item.description: President Biden opted Friday to voluntarily take a host of questions from the press after delivering remarks on the day’s job report, a speech that had been put on the White House schedule last minute.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5
